scripts.build: swiftc src/mic-check.swift -framework CoreAudio -o src/mic-check && swiftc src/rec-status.swift -framework Cocoa -o src/rec-status && swiftc src/system-audio-capture.swift -framework ScreenCaptureKit -framework CoreMedia -o src/system-audio-capture && bun build --compile src/index.ts --outfile meeting-transcriber
